title: scutellaria × pubescens
intro: Scutellaria × pubescens, also known as hybrid skullcap, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is a hybrid of the American skullcap (Scutellaria galericulata) and the mad skullcap (Scutellaria lateriflora). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Scutellaria × pubescens include its potential to reduce anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against neurodegenerative diseases. Scutellaria × pubescens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
